title: Customer Churn Prediction Platform
description: Cloud-native software system for real-time predictive decision-making using scalable service architecture and ML-driven inference pipelines.
longDescription: Designed and built a cloud-native software system for real-time predictive decision-making, exposing churn predictions through a scalable API layer. The system integrates ML inference pipelines (XGBoost), feature engineering workflows, and modular service architecture. Deployed using Docker and AWS ECS with load balancing for production-grade scalability and reliability.
problem: Businesses require real-time decision systems that can integrate into production software to proactively identify customer churn risk.
solution: Engineered a distributed system architecture using FastAPI for service orchestration, Docker for containerization, and AWS ECS for scalable deployment of ML inference services.
results: Delivered a production-ready software system capable of serving real-time predictions at scale, demonstrating strong skills in system design, cloud architecture, and software engineering principles.

title: Adaptive RAG Resume Assistant
description: Intelligent document processing system using retrieval-augmented generation, semantic search, and LLM-powered query orchestration.
longDescription: Built an intelligent document processing system using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), combining vector search, embedding pipelines, and LLM orchestration. Designed a modular architecture supporting document ingestion, semantic retrieval, query routing, and structured response generation through API-based services.
problem: Organizations and recruiters struggle to efficiently query and extract structured insights from large volumes of unstructured resume data.
solution: Engineered a scalable RAG-based system integrating vector databases, semantic search pipelines, and LLM-based reasoning layers exposed through a service-oriented API architecture.
results: Improved semantic retrieval relevance by ~60%, demonstrating expertise in modern AI systems, backend architecture, and software design patterns.

title: Semantic Recommendation Engine
description: Scalable semantic search and recommendation system built using embedding-based retrieval and similarity search architecture.
longDescription: Designed and implemented a semantic recommendation system that replaces traditional keyword-based search with embedding-based retrieval. Built data processing pipelines, vector indexing workflows, and a lightweight API layer for serving real-time recommendations in a scalable architecture.
problem: Traditional recommendation systems fail to capture semantic relationships between items, leading to low relevance and poor user experience.
solution: Engineered a software system using vector embeddings and similarity search to enable semantic retrieval and recommendation at scale.
results: Delivered a high-relevance recommendation system demonstrating strong skills in search systems, backend architecture, and data-driven software design.

title: Distributed Traffic Analytics Platform
description: Large-scale distributed data processing and analytics system built using Apache Spark, GCP, and service-based architecture.
longDescription: Built a distributed data processing system capable of handling 94M+ records using Apache Spark on Google Cloud Dataproc. Designed ETL pipelines, transformation workflows, and a service-based architecture for serving processed insights through APIs. Integrated observability and monitoring using the ELK stack for system reliability.
problem: City-scale traffic datasets require distributed processing systems capable of handling large-scale analytics efficiently.
solution: Designed a distributed software system using Spark for large-scale computation and backend services for serving processed insights with observability layers.
results: Processed 94M+ records efficiently and demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, data engineering, and cloud-scale software architecture.

title: Real-Time Computer Vision System
description: Low-latency real-time perception system for object detection in robotic environments using optimized inference pipelines.
longDescription: Built a real-time computer vision system designed for deployment in autonomous robotic environments. The system includes optimized inference pipelines, model efficiency improvements, and integration with downstream decision-making modules for real-time performance.
problem: Robotic systems require low-latency, reliable perception systems capable of operating in dynamic real-world environments.
solution: Engineered a modular real-time vision system optimized for performance, enabling efficient object detection and system-level integration.
results: Reduced inference latency by 40% and improved tracking stability by 30%, demonstrating expertise in performance engineering and real-time software systems.

title: Full-Stack AI Diagnosis System
description: End-to-end software system combining backend services, ML inference pipelines, and mobile application integration.
longDescription: Developed a full-stack software system integrating a Flask-based backend API with a mobile application for real-time AI-based plant disease diagnosis. Designed inference services, model serving architecture, and data preprocessing pipelines to enable real-time end-user predictions.
problem: Agricultural diagnostic tools are often inaccessible, slow, or not usable in real-time environments.
solution: Built a full-stack software system combining backend APIs, ML inference services, and mobile integration for real-time predictions.
results: Achieved 85%+ accuracy and demonstrated full-stack software engineering, system design, and AI integration capabilities.
